title: Melissa Rodriguez
compiled_truth: Melissa Rodriguez is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-03-29), Melissa Rodriguez sent 8 and received 242 emails, totalling 250 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (5), [Leslie Smith](people/leslie-smith) (3), [Lisa Shoemake](people/lisa-shoemake) (3), [Judy Hernandez](people/judy-hernandez) (3), [Airam Arteaga](people/airam-arteaga) (3).
